feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to handle multilevel inter-company for service contract in public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

We have a requirement to support an intercompany service contract process for capacity-based services.

As per my understanding, the single-level intercompany scenario can be handled using a Royalties Intercompany Condition Contract setup. However, in our case, we need to support a multi-level intercompany chain.

Scenario Example:

  • The end customer is located in the USA.

  • The USA entity routes the request to the Netherlands entity.

  • The Netherlands entity does not have the service available, so it forwards the request to Luxembourg.

  • The Luxembourg entity provides the service directly to the end customer.

Our Requirement:

We need to understand how this multi-tier intercompany service fulfillment process can be modeled in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (or On-Prem if applicable), especially in the context of:

  • Service contract flow

  • Intercompany billing and cost flow across all three entities

  • Revenue recognition and profitability tracking

  • Legal entity compliance

I would greatly appreciate any guidance or recommendations on the best practice approach or supported architecture for such a scenario.

Thanks & Best regards,
Tirupati RK

entry.title: Manage Supplier Quotations Custom Field/Logic
entry.content: I created a checkbox field at header for manage supplier quotation app in MM_PURDDOC_HEADER business context. After that i created a custom logic that controls the checkbox if it's checked or not in MM_PUR_S4_QTN_CHECK. Even though I have ticked the checkbox in the header, I am getting an error saying that this field is not ticked in the items. What could be the problem?

entry.title: No Freight unit created from Sales order in S/4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

we are on S/4 HANA Public cloud TM. From Sales order, FU is not getting created. I have checked, all settings are there like weight , Logistics profile etc.

I want to use program /SCMTMS/CHK_DOC_INT_TM_INTEGR to see what is missing but I cant use since no SE38 in public cloud and Iam even not sure this program exists in Public cloud TM and if yes which app to use to run it or is there any other way to find out why FU is not created ?

 

rgds

sar

entry.title: In Customer invoice Accounting entry Customer line item account type D is splitting Twice
entry.content:
why is there more lines on ledger view for customer/supplier item


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: mass change of fixed asset master data in S/4HANA Cloud e.g. costcenter
entry.content:
Hello, 

is there a possibility in S/4HANA Cloud (public) to change in mass fixed asset master data e.g. costcenter, profitcenter like LSMW function in private or on premise?

Thanks for your help. 

BR Jasmin

entry.title: "Define Freight order type" config node missing in S/4 HANA Cloud TM
entry.content:
Hello,

I could not find the config node in SPRO for "define FO type". Is the "defibe FO types " config not available in S/4 HANA Public cloud ?

 

rgds

sar

entry.title: MTO and return order material value
entry.content:
We are using sap S/4 HANA Public cloud. 

We have a MTO scenario and we complete the MRP -> Planned order -> Production -> FG -> Invoice. When for some business reason we have to take return of the material after invoicing a return order is created and the material reversal to blocked stock happens but at 0 value. 

1. We need the value of the FG material to be updated  as per the cost what we had in the sales order as we receive the material 

2. How to we reassign the same material once returned to some other sales order

We are in urgent need of the solution 

we use serial numbers for the FG produced

entry.title: Special GL indicator field/Using Alternative Account for Supplier in Create supplier invoice App
entry.content:
• According to SAP Note 2856664, the Create Incoming Invoices app does not offer park functionality, and the resolution provided is to use the Fiori app Create Supplier Invoice (App ID F0859) for parking supplier invoices.

I understand that in the Create Supplier Invoice app, invoices can be created without reference to a Purchase Order, and we are able to select Document Type in the details section, as also recommended by the J60 Test Script.

However, I am facing a few issues with this app in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud:

- There is no field for Special G/L Indicator (e.g. for down payments or other special postings), which limits our ability to handle some specific business cases.

- It is not possible to change the G/L Account (Reconciliation Account) of the supplier line item. In some scenarios, we would like to use an alternative account (different from the reconciliation account in the supplier master data), similar to the flexibility provided in the Create Outgoing Invoice (FB60) app in the On-Premise version.

While I still want to park the document, I find these limitations blocking the process.

Could you please advise:

  • If there is any workaround  for including the Special G/L Indicator field in the Create Supplier Invoice app?
  • If it's possible to manually assign a different G/L Account to the supplier line item in this app (perhaps via configuration or extension)?

  • And finally, is there a way to park such documents (with Special G/L or custom G/L Account) in the current cloud setup?

Looking forward to your guidance.

entry.title: CLT: Copy country by itself
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

 

Out of curiosity, can we copy an existing country as itself and change the country currency? e.g. SG -> SG

My ask is because we have this requirement that the functional currency is not the same as local currency, in Public Cloud we are not able to change the local currency. When we presented to them the solution of additional currency, they don't want to accept it because of the inherent issue due to exchange rate differences. Particularly cost estimate and production cost are all costed in local currency and not in functional currency aggravating more on the exchange rate differences. 

Regards, 

Derek

entry.title: SAP CPI Message Mapping – Filter and Align Business Partner names correctly per line item
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm working in SAP Integration Suite on a transformation/message mapping scenario where I need to transform repeating lines into individual records in the target.

My Goal:

  • For each <LineItem>, select the correct BusinessPartner name in the correct order

  • The correct name can appear in either <Name1> or <Name2> depending on other logic.

  • If either value is equal to "CompanyX", it should be excluded

  • If names are null/empty, I want to output the string "Empty"

Example Input (Simplified):

<Document>
<MessageHeader>
<Header>

<LineItem>
<Linedetails>
<InvolvedParties>
<Party>
<Buyer>
<Name1>CompanyX</Name1>
</Buyer>
<Seller>
<Name2>Company1</Name2>
</Seller>
</Party>
</InvolvedParties>
</Linedetails>
</LineItem>

<LineItem>
<Linedetails>
<InvolvedParties>
<!-- No Party/Name elements -->
</InvolvedParties>
</Linedetails>
</LineItem>

<LineItem>
<Linedetails>
<InvolvedParties>
<Party>
<Seller>
<Name1>Company2</Name1>
</Seller>
<Buyer>
<Name2>CompanyX</Name2>
</Buyer>
</Party>
</InvolvedParties>
</Linedetails>
</LineItem>

</Header>
</MessageHeader>
</Document>

NOTE: CompanyX should never be sent to the output.

The output i get:

<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Company1</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>
<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Company2</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>
<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Empty</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>

Expected Output:

<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Company1</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>
<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Empty</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>
<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Company2</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>

What I Tried:
- A Groovy UDF that takes in Name1, Name2, and a third "anchor" value to trigger per-row execution

Despite this, the output becomes misaligned: either names are skipped, appear in the wrong order, or "Empty" shows up at the wrong line.

What’s the best approach in CPI Message Mapping to:

  • Process each <LineItem> individually with the correct data in correct order? i.e. when fields are empty/null, it wont take the next available value to populate the field.

  • Ensure correct row alignment and output order

  • Return a default "Empty" if both names are excluded

Any help, especially from those working with multi-row mappings or filtering per record, would be really appreciated.

entry.title: Customer Return Orders
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Our customer is requested to create customer return orders with products without pricing. Please advise which item category against RBLN/RBPN/RENV/RNVN etc. is applicable? If not, any pricing configuration can be set to achieve this purpose?

entry.title: US company code - taxation in Germany
entry.content:
Dear SAP community,

My client has the following issue: They have one company code in Germany and one in the USA. Occasionally, a sale from the US company code to Germany takes place. In this case, the German tax authorities require that the invoice and accounting reflect a 19% VAT (i.e., the standard German VAT rate). This tax must then also be reported and paid in Germany.

Now here's the problem: RITA (Registration for Indirect Taxation abroad) is not an option in this case, because it's not applicable in the US. Additionally, external tax determination is active in the US company code, which complicates things further.

So the question is: How can I ensure that a sale from the US to DE correctly applies the 19% German VAT? Does anyone have any ideas or solutions?

Tanks in advance,

Angelika

entry.title: SAP S/4 Hana public Expected Delivery Notification Alert for a Requestor
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need some advice regarding a customer requirement on SAP S/4 Hana public. They would like the requestor to receive a notification about the expected delivery date for an item that is due to arrive. Additionally, if no receipt has been made after a certain period, a follow-up notification should be sent.

We have tried testing the situations handling procurement templates, but so far, it hasn't worked as expected, and we haven't received any notifications.

If anyone has experience with this and can share the configuration process to meet this requirement, I would greatly appreciate it.

Thank you!

Regards

Matsie

entry.title: How to Restrict Access at Product Group Level in Manage Product Master Data App?
entry.content:
We are facing an issue in the Manage Product Master Data app where we are unable to restrict user access based on product group. Users are currently able to view and edit product master data for all product groups.

We are attempting to restrict write access at the product group level in the Manage Product Master Data Fiori app

While configuring the restriction in the "Authorization Group for Product Group" field, we are encountering the following issue : The value help (F4) for Authorization Group for Product Group does not display any available values.

Is "Authorization Group for Product Group" currently supported for access control in the Manage Product Master Data app?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Change formatting for Footer information via Manage Text
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are using Manage Text in S/4HANA Public Cloud to manage the information displayed in the Footer of the master template. There we show multiple lines of text and we would like some of the text to be formatted in bold.

Is it possible to add html tags or other formatting options via the app Manage Text?

Thanks

Thomas

entry.title: Asset Accounting - What is ECC t-code ABSK in S/4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am working for a client who is transforming from ECC to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This asset topic is related to retirement with revenue and not integrated with Accounts Receivable (Local GAAP for Finland)

Our client has in ECC been using transaction ABSK, to achieve that the revenue part is being reposted from Gain from asset transactions account to depreciation difference account. 

Now in S/4 Public  cloud, the revenue part of the asset sales is posted to gain and loss to accounts defined in KTMEHR (for gain) and KTMIND (for loss). This is however not correct yet from accounting point of view. The revenue part should eventually hit the depreciation difference account, so that the P&L impact is zero for the company, but how can this be achieved in S/4 Public cloud?

I can google transaction types 200 (loss) and 210 (gain), but I cannot find those in particular in any of the posting menus. 

Hopefully somebody can help?

Thanks and Br,

-me-

entry.title: Different picking locations on 1 Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hello,
 
my customer wants to be able in the same purchase order different picking location as the same business partner can have different physical location.
 
My first guess was to change the location directly on the FO, but I have an error message : 
If I change the location at FO level :

 

 
So 2nd guess is to modify directly in the purchase order
If we add at header level a GS partner :

 

At FO level the result is

 

The issue is that the modification is made at header level, for all the items of the PO and consequently for all the FU
This solution is not relevant for my customer because their process is to send a PO to their supplier, then the supplier replies and indicates on which location the shipment will occur.
 
Is there another solution that will allow to have different picking location on a PO ? Maybe by adding a location custom field at PO item level ?

entry.title: Interest-bearing accounts with credit interest
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

Could you please provide more details on the following:

  1. The relevant scope item codes for managing interest rates for bank accounts (credit interest).

  2. Information on any specific modules or configuration steps required to set up and manage interest-bearing accounts.

  3. Best practices or recommendations for integrating interest management with our existing SAP modules.

Your assistance would be greatly appreciated. I look forward to your guidance.

 

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to copy customizing settings from a Company code to a new one?
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

Is there a tool or a way in S/4HANA Public Cloud to copy customizing settings from a Company code to a newly created one?

The reason for my question is the following: when you want to switch the local currency you are working with, the proposed way is to create a new company code with new local currency. Should we go through all the settings or there is an easier way?

Thank you in advance,

Peter K.

entry.title: Anyone taken the sap C_S4CFI_2504 exam recently? Need advice on resources + tricky topics
entry.content:
Hello, I’m prepping for the C_S4CFI_2504 exam (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Financial Accounting) and was hoping to get some insight from anyone who's taken it recently.

I’ve been going through the official SAP Learning Journey, which is helpful, but I still feel a bit shaky on a few things, especially when it comes to organizational structures (company code, chart of accounts, etc.) in the cloud setup. It’s a bit confusing how they all connect.

I’m also wondering what topics you’d say are the most important to really focus on, anything you wish you’d studied more before taking the exam? Were there any surprise questions or tricky areas that caught you off guard? And lastly, are there any good practice tests or preparation resources out there besides the Learning Hub that helped you prepare? I’d really appreciate any tips or pointers you’re willing to share, just trying to go into this feeling a bit more confident. Thanks in advance!
